recap: Created src/icons.jsonc with all icons organized into nested groups (git, docker, etc.) and flat entries for categories with bare keys (node, ruby, claude). Deleted static icons.zsh.
Created icons-build autoload function that reads src/icons.jsonc, flattens nested keys with -, and writes dist/icons.zsh + dist/icons.json. Updated icons-load-definitions to source dist/icons.zsh.
